auction.description: Contract and deliveries will stand from June 20th to November 20th - Delivery: June/September/November 20 000kg per month with 10 000kg security stock, total volume 70 000kg.
auction.commercials_terms: Each company agree to deliver the raw material refering to the specification enclosed. If a deviation is needed, R&D needs to agree before particpating to the eAuction.
